resources.author: QuantifyED Team

resources.title: Data Interpretation Sprint Session
resources.summary: A guided video-link resource focused on chart reading speed and set selection.
resources.description: This session is ideal for students who want a quick reset on DI pacing. It focuses on picking the right set, avoiding over-calculation, and spotting chart traps in mixed mock sections.
resources.author: QuantifyED Team

resources.title: Logical Reasoning Foundation Pack
resources.summary: A PDF bundle for syllogisms, seating arrangements, coding, and blood relations.
resources.description: Built as a starter pack for competitive exam learners, this resource groups together high-frequency reasoning patterns, solved examples, and mini-drills for concept reinforcement.
resources.author: QuantifyED Team

resources.title: Placement Verbal Ability Playbook
resources.summary: A curated video-link resource for RC strategy, grammar traps, and tone-based questions.
resources.description: This resource is meant for students preparing for campus placements who need a dependable verbal reset. It highlights the most common grammar mistakes and how to read faster without losing accuracy.
resources.author: QuantifyED Team

resources.title: Bank PO Speed Math Cheat Sheet
resources.summary: A compact PDF for percentages, ratios, averages, and approximation techniques.
resources.description: This PDF is structured around timed practice. It is especially useful for learners who know the concepts but want to improve speed through familiar patterns and simplified solving methods.
resources.author: QuantifyED Team
